info.title: neoxp
info.description: neo-express is a Neo developer blockchain tool

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Neo N3 blockchain private net for developers

commands.name: batch
commands.description: Execute a series of offline Neo-Express operations

options.name: --reset
options.description: Reset blockchain to genesis or specified checkpoint before running batch file commands

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a neo-express checkpoint (discarding changes on shutdown)

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy contract to a neo-express instance

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description: Witness Scope to use for transaction signer (Default: CalledByEntry)

options.name: --data
options.description: Optional data parameter to pass to _deploy operation

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

options.name: --force
options.description: Deploy contract regardless of name conflict

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract deployment GAS fee

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download contract with storage from remote chain into local chain

options.name: --height
options.description:
Block height to get contract state for
Zero gets the latest

options.name: --force
options.description:
Replace contract and storage if it already exists
Defaults to None if option unspecified, All if option value unspecified

arguments.name: RpcUri
arguments.description:
URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
Specify MainNet (default), TestNet or JSON-RPC URL

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get information for a deployed contract

commands.name: hash
commands.description: Get contract hash for contract path and deployment account

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account that would deploy the contract

commands.name: invoke
commands.description: Invoke a contract using parameters from .neo-invoke.json file

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description: Witness Scope to use for transaction signer (Default: CalledByEntry)

options.name: --results
options.description: Invoke contract for results (does not cost GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description: Additional GAS to apply to the contract invocation

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: InvocationFile
arguments.description: Path to contract invocation JSON file

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

commands.name: run
commands.description: Invoke a contract using parameters passed on command line

options.name: --account
options.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description: Witness Scope to use for transaction signer (Default: CalledByEntry)

options.name: --results
options.description: Invoke contract for results (does not cost GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description: Additional GAS to apply to the contract invocation

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: Arguments
arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the invoked method

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update the storage of a contract given the new key-value pair

commands.name: update
commands.description: update a contract that has been deployed to a neo-express instance

options.name: --data
options.description: Data parameter for update method on contract (Format: JSON)

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description: Witness Scope to use for transaction signer (Default: CalledByEntry)

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract deployment GAS fee

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Checks a contract for compliance with proposal specification

commands.name: nep17
commands.description: Checks if contract is NEP-17 compliant

commands.name: nep11
commands.description: Checks if contract is NEP-11 compliant

options.name: --output
options.description:
Name of .neo-express file to create
Default location is home directory as:
Linux: $HOME/.neo-express/default.neo-express
Windows: %UserProfile%\.neo-express\default.neo-express

options.name: --count
options.description: Number of consensus nodes to create (Default: 1)

options.name: --address-version
options.description: Version to use for addresses in this blockchain instance (Default: 53)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
Private key for default dev account (Format: HEX or WIF)
Default: Random

options.name: --batch-filename
options.description: Use a batch file to initialize the blockchain after creation.

commands.name: execute
commands.description: Invoke a custom script, the input text will be converted to script with a priority: hex, base64, file path.

options.name: --account
options.description: Account to pay invocation GAS fee

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description: Witness Scope for transaction signer(s) (Allowed: None, CalledByEntry, Global)

options.name: --results
options.description: Invoke contract for results (does not cost GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description: Additional GAS to apply to the contract invocation

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: InputText
arguments.description: A neo-vm script (Format: HEX, BASE64, Filename)

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export neo-express protocol, config and wallet files

commands.name: fastfwd
commands.description: Mint empty blocks to fast forward the block chain

options.name: --timestamp-delta
options.description: Timestamp delta for last generated block

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

arguments.name: ResponsePath
arguments.description: Path to JSON file with oracle response content

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

commands.name: get
commands.description: Retrieve current value of a blockchain policy

options.name: --rpc-uri
options.description:
URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
Specify MainNet (default), TestNet or JSON-RPC URL

arguments.name: ScriptHash
arguments.description: Account to check block status of

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Synchronize local policy values with public Neo network

options.name: --account
options.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Source
arguments.description:
Source of policy values. Must be local policy settings JSON file or the URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
For Node URL,"MainNet" or "TestNet" can be specified in addition to a standard HTTP URL

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

arguments.name: Asset
arguments.description: Asset to show balance of (symbol or script hash)

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to show asset balance for

commands.name: balances
commands.description: Show all NEP-17 asset balances for an account

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to show asset balances for

arguments.name: BlockHash
arguments.description: Optional block hash or index. Show most recent block if unspecified

commands.name: notifications
commands.description: Shows contract notifications in JSON format

options.name: --contract
options.description: Limit shown notifications to the specified contract

options.name: --event-name
options.description: Limit shown notifications to specified event name

arguments.name: Account
arguments.description: Account to show NFT (Format: Script Hash, Address, Wallet name)

arguments.name: BlockHash
arguments.description: Optional block hash or index. Show most recent block if unspecified

options.name: --data
options.description: Optional data parameter to pass to transfer operation

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Asset
arguments.description: Asset to transfer (symbol or script hash)

options.name: --data
options.description: Optional data parameter to pass to transfer operation

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 sender

arguments.name: Sender
arguments.description: Account to send NFT from (Format: Wallet name, WIF)

arguments.name: Receiver
arguments.description: Account to send NFT to (Format: Script Hash, Address, Wallet name)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
Private key for account (Format: HEX or WIF)
Default: Random

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export neo-express wallet in NEP-6 format

options.name: --output
options.description: NEP-6 wallet name (Defaults to Neo-Express name if unspecified)
